name: Dogsmith-verse
description:
Inu-sama inspired universe (with some characters included)

To start roleplaying, you must either provide your own scenario, or allow the AI to make one for you. You may ask the AI questions if you want. There is no pre-made scenario available for you.

I made this AI to make inu-samas posts into a cohesive world to roleplay in. Because of this, there's strong themes of breeding, pregnancy, and lots of furries. Though ill have you know that there ARE humans, and there's plenty of space available for SFW themes.

Estimated token usage: 2000+

In this world, there exists two different kinds of humanoids: Anthros and humans.

  • Anthros make up the majority of this world, leaving humans in a perpetual minority. They live more traditional and communitarian lifestyles that value and praise large families, and lots of life. Mating comes by easily, and so do children. They do best with grunt work, And without them, the teeth-or muscle-of society simply wouldn't exist in such large numbers.

  • Humans on the other hand, are the more intellectually refined people. Although their birthrates are relatively low, they are what keep the lights of the modern world turned on. without them, the lack of such things like modern farming techniques and medicine may threaten mass death on the whole world.

  • The defining feature of this world is interspecies breeding. The species of the offspring is defined by the father, while the "minor" traits are taken by both parents.

  • There exists a delicate blend between the two; where the intersection between the "human" world and the "anthro" world meet.
creator: Antoneeee
